---
title: "Contacto"
sidebar: false
page-layout: article
toc: false
title-block-banner: true
---
## Contacto personal

- **Email:** [sergio.zavaleta.cc@gmail.com](mailto:sergio.zavaleta.cc@gmail.com)

- **GitHub:** [@SJacoboZavaleta](https://www.github.com/SJacoboZavaleta)

- **LinkedIn:** [sjacobozavaleta](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sjacobozavaleta/)

- **X:** [@JacoboZavaleta](https://twitter.com/JacoboZavaleta)

## Contacto académico

- **Email:** [sjacobo@unitru.edu.pe](mailto:sjacobo@unitru.edu.pe)
